objective: Provide independent no-skip adversarial and conformance tests for the pure Stage 1 ValidationReceipt and DomainTrialLinkReceipt boundary without changing implementation files.
executable_blocker: The validation boundary cannot be accepted until independent tests prove that malformed, unpinned, replayed, cross-contour, D2/D3 or scientifically unbound receipts never produce a reference projection.

required_success: one exact synthetic D0 and one exact synthetic D1 chain
projection contains no proposed_outcome checks metrics tolerances reasons or raw payload
required_failures: all three canonical-integrity and exact-shape failures
non-mechanical execution and execution-validation artifact mismatch
unpinned validator id or sha and unexpected registry writer
missing execution or validation parent binding
protocol policy contour classification or timestamp mismatch
D2 and D3 denial before projection
nonportable file or host reference denial
assurance_contract.static_boundary: validation.py has no file network process dynamic import eval exec callback persistence ledger CAS ingestion or domain writer surface

acceptance_commands: make test after Agent 0 composes audited implementation
public privacy, secret, skip, forbidden-import and exact write-set scan
rollback: Agent 0 reverts the assurance-only commit and discards synthetic in-memory fixtures; implementation, domain registries and external state are untouched.
